description: Style Note Elegant and bright casual wear with a flattering Fit and impressive styling is definitely tonga's forte. This skirt from Tonga is a definite must for the update of your summer monsoon wardrobe. Keep it stylish and simple and pair this trendy skirt with a well fitted, figure hugging tank top in muted colours. We like to describe this look as charmingly casual! Product Details Printed, puffed, mini skirt with bright and colourful floral prints, has a broad elasticated black waistband, gathered around the waist to give a pleated look and white lining Material and Care 100% polyester Hand wash cold Do not bleach Hang or line dry Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
